def solve(nums : Array(Int64)) : Int64
  n = nums.length
  total_cost = 0.0_i64

  if n <= 1
    return 0.0_i64
  end

  for i in 0..(n - 2)
    difference = nums[i] - nums[i+1]
    
    if difference > 0
      total_cost += difference
    end
  end

  return total_cost
end
